data.title: 2-Day KL  Weekend

stops.description: Specialty coffee in a restored Pudu heritage building
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your breakfast — a highly rated spot
stops.address: 2, Jalan Galloway, Bukit Bintang, 50150 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: Iconic 452m twin towers with skybridge and observation deck
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your tourist attraction — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Lower Ground (Concourse) Level, Menara Berkembar Petronas, Kuala Lumpur City Centre, 50088 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: Curated heritage hawker stalls in a basement food court
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your lunch — a highly rated spot
stops.address: lot 10, 50, Jln Bukit Bintang, Bukit Bintang, 55100 Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: Instagram-famous hidden alley with nostalgic murals
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your photo spot — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: Lorong Panggung, City Centre, 50000 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: 272 rainbow steps to limestone cave Hindu temple
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your tourist attraction — a highly rated spot

stops.description: Traditional Malay village in the city center, amazing street food
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your dinner — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: Kampung Baru, Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: KL's largest entertainment hub with clubs and bars
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your night activity — a highly rated spot
stops.address: 438, Jln Tun Razak, KL City Centre, 50400 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: Legendary nasi lemak since 1948 at Lake Gardens
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your breakfast — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: Kompleks Makan Tanglin, Gerai, No. 6, Jalan Cenderasari, Wilayah Persekutuan, 50480 Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: Iconic 452m twin towers with skybridge and observation deck

stops.description: World-class Islamic art collection with stunning domes
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your tourist attraction — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Islamic Arts Museum Malaysia, Jalan Lembah, Tasik Perdana, 50480 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: 6-tier Chinese temple with panoramic KL views
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your tourist attraction — a highly rated spot
stops.address: 65, Persiaran Endah, Taman Persiaran Desa, 50460 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: KL's most famous food street, open-air dining
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your dinner — a highly rated spot
stops.address: 64, 亚罗街, Bukit Bintang, 50200 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

stops.description: Rooftop bar on an active helipad with 360° skyline
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your night activity — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: 34 Menara KH, Jln Sultan Ismail, Bukit Bintang, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

tips: Check opening hours — some famous spots close on Mondays
Grab is affordable (RM 5-15 per ride in city centers)
Street food is where you find Malaysia's best flavors at the best prices
Dress modestly when visiting religious sites (cover shoulders and knees)
